mapper.select: SELECT FID, FBillNo, FDocumentStatus, FBillTypeID, FDate, FReceiveDeptId, FPurOrgId, FReceiverId, F_jcf, FSupplierId, F_gcbz, F_shdz, F_DATE_jz, F_djtjcf, FSupplyId, FProviderContactId, FSupplyAddress, FSettleId, FChargeId, FSettleModeId, FPayConditionId, FSettleCurrId, FAllDisCount, FCreatorId, FCreateDate, FModifierId, FModifyDate, FApproveDate, FApproverId, F_cty_Date FROM receive_notice WHERE FBillNo = #{billNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO receive_notice ( FID, FBillNo, FDocumentStatus, FBillTypeID, FDate, FReceiveDeptId, FPurOrgId, FReceiverId, F_jcf, FSupplierId, F_gcbz, F_shdz, F_DATE_jz, F_djtjcf, FSupplyId, FProviderContactId, FSupplyAddress, FSettleId, FChargeId, FSettleModeId, FPayConditionId, FSettleCurrId, FAllDisCount, FCreatorId, FCreateDate, FModifierId, FModifyDate, FApproveDate, FApproverId, F_cty_Date ) VALUES ( #{fid}, #{fBillNo}, #{fDocumentStatus}, #{fBillTypeID}, #{fDate}, #{fReceiveDeptId}, #{fPurOrgId}, #{fReceiverId}, #{fjcf}, #{fSupplierId}, #{fgcbz}, #{fshdz}, #{fDATEjz}, #{fdjtjcf}, #{fSupplyId}, #{fProviderContactId}, #{fSupplyAddress}, #{fSettleId}, #{fChargeId}, #{fSettleModeId}, #{fPayConditionId}, #{fSettleCurrId}, #{fAllDisCount}, #{fCreatorId}, #{fCreateDate}, #{fModifierId}, #{fModifyDate}, #{fApproveDate}, #{fApproverId}, #{fctyDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM receive_notice ORDER BY FDate DESC

SELECT re.FID, re.FBillNo, re.FDocumentStatus, re.FBillTypeID, re.FDate, re.FReceiveDeptId, re.FPurOrgId, re.FReceiverId, re.F_jcf, sur.name as FSupplierId, re.F_gcbz, re.F_shdz, re.F_DATE_jz, re.F_djtjcf, sup.name as FSupplyId, re.FProviderContactId, re.FSupplyAddress, supl.name as FSettleId, suple.name as FChargeId, re.FSettleModeId, re.FPayConditionId, bdy.name as FSettleCurrId, re.FAllDisCount, sue.user_name as FCreatorId, re.FCreateDate, se.user_name as FModifierId, re.FModifyDate, re.FApproveDate, sye.user_name as FApproverId, re.F_cty_Date FROM receive_notice re LEFT JOIN sys_user sue on re.FCreatorId=sue.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user se on re.FModifierId=se.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user sye on re.FApproverId=sye.k3_key LEFT JOIN supplier sur on re.FSupplierId=sur.supplierid LEFT JOIN supplier sup on re.FSupplyId=sup.supplierid LEFT JOIN supplier supl on re.FSettleId=supl.supplierid LEFT JOIN supplier suple on re.FChargeId=suple.supplierid LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdy on re.FSettleCurrId=bdy.kingdee and bdy.category='currency' ORDER BY FDate DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO receive_notice ( FID, FBillNo, FDocumentStatus, FBillTypeID, FDate, FReceiveDeptId, FPurOrgId, FReceiverId, F_jcf, FSupplierId, F_gcbz, F_shdz, F_DATE_jz, F_djtjcf, FSupplyId, FProviderContactId, FSupplyAddress, FSettleId, FChargeId, FSettleModeId, FPayConditionId, FSettleCurrId, FAllDisCount, FCreatorId, FCreateDate, FModifierId, FModifyDate, FApproveDate, FApproverId, F_cty_Date ) VALUES
( #{item.fid}, #{item.fBillNo}, #{item.fDocumentStatus}, #{item.fBillTypeID}, #{item.fDate}, #{item.fReceiveDeptId}, #{item.fPurOrgId}, #{item.fReceiverId}, #{item.fjcf}, #{item.fSupplierId}, #{item.fgcbz}, #{item.fshdz}, #{item.fDATEjz}, #{item.fdjtjcf}, #{item.fSupplyId}, #{item.fProviderContactId}, #{item.fSupplyAddress}, #{item.fSettleId}, #{item.fChargeId}, #{item.fSettleModeId}, #{item.fPayConditionId}, #{item.fSettleCurrId}, #{item.fAllDisCount}, #{item.fCreatorId}, #{item.fCreateDate}, #{item.fModifierId}, #{item.fModifyDate}, #{item.fApproveDate}, #{item.fApproverId}, #{item.fctyDate} )
